programme.title: Think Like A Man Too
programme.desc: All the couples are back for a wedding in Las Vegas, but plans for a romantic weekend go awry when their various misadventures get them into some compromising situations that threaten to derail the big event.

programme.title: Paul Blart: Mall Cop
programme.desc: In Columbia Pictures' comedy Paul Blart: Mall Cop, Kevin James stars as the title character, a single, suburban dad, trying to make ends meet as a security officer at a New Jersey mall. Though no one else takes his job seriously, Paul considers himself on the front lines of safety. When a heist shuts down the megaplex, Jersey's most formidable mall cop will have to become a real cop to save the day.

programme.title: Holmes And Watson
programme.desc: A humorous take on Arthur Conan Doyle's classic mysteries featuring Sherlock Holmes and Doctor Watson.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Samantha And The Loch Ness Monster
programme.desc: Samantha summons cousin Serena to change the Loch Ness monster back into warlock Bruce, but it turns out he was better left as the monster.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: Samantha's Not So Leaning Tower Of Pisa
programme.desc: Esmeralda decides to right a wrong she committed hundreds of years ago, and she straightens the Leaning Tower of Pisa.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Venus, noted for her charm, and Endora, noted for her weird sense of humor, team up against Darrin, noted for being the butt of his mother-in-law's tricks.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha's father Maurice is upset that she and Darrin didn't stop off in London to see him, so he takes out his anger on Darrin.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: The Ghost Who Made A Spectre Of Himself
programme.desc: Darrin becomes very romantic when Harry the ghost takes over his body.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha's witchcraft threatens to make her a reluctant TV star.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: A Plague On Maurice And Samantha
programme.desc: Maurice finds out how the "other half" lives when he temporarily loses his powers.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha and Tabitha encounter a wicked witch as they switch places with Hansel and Gretel.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: The Warlock In The Gray Flannel Suit
programme.desc: Endora finds that Madison Avenue is Darrin's territory.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Endora enlists the help of a cat to stir up some jealousy in Samantha.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: 3 Men And A Witch On A Horse
programme.desc: Samantha fixes a race - but Darrin is a loser anyway.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin finds out, the hard way, that his son Adam has supernatural powers.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Esmeralda's tragic magic strikes again!

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha wakes up with a condition called Gravititis Inflamitis but puts it to good use for one of Darrin's clients.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darin finds out that Serena is in trouble - with or without her power.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha is all set to learn to skate the mortal way, but Endora gives her a little help.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Serena slips Larry a youth pill and he becomes younger and younger and younger.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha’s first day at school turns out to an eventful one; she changes the class bully into a frog.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Esmeralda tries to zap George Washington's buckle and button out of a book, and instead zaps out George himself.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: A memorable visit from George and Martha Washington results from Esmeralda's messed up magic.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha gets an assist from her grandmother when Endora casts a spell that turns her into a 7year-old super genius.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: A Good Turn Never Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin argue over the use of witchcraft in an ad campaign.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Old Chines proverb: Witch should blink softly and never touch cinnamon stick.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: The Truth, Nothing But The Truth, So Help Me Sam
programme.desc: Endora casts a "truth spell" on a gift from Darrin to Samantha that causes everyone embarrassment.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.sub-title: I, Darrin, Take This Witch Samantha
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin appear to be an ideally matched couple. Very much in love, they decide to marry. Darrin doesn't know that Samantha, is, of all things, a witch. On their wedding night, Samantha's mother, Endora, a witch, of course, visits her daughter. Regretting that her daughter has married a mortal, she is bent on breaking up the marriage. After pleading with her mother not to interfere, Samantha decides to tell her husband that he has unknowingly married a witch. To convince Darrin of her magic powers, Samantha performs a series of tricks. Darrin makes her promise never to practice her witchcraft again. Sheila, a former girl friend of Darrin's, invites the newly-weds to a dinner party. She makes every effort to embarrass Samantha before the guests. After enduring Sheila's snubs and insults, Samantha cannot resist evening the score. She employs her extraordinary powers to humiliate Sheila. Later, at home, Darrin rebukes his wife, but admits Sheila deserved the tricks played on her.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.sub-title: It Shouldn't Happen to a Dog
programme.desc: Samantha gives a dinner party to impress Rex Barker, one of Darrin's clients. Rex brings along his date, Babs Livingston, but advances on Samantha in the garden when he gets drunk.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: Gladys Kravitz, a neighbor, is unable to convince her husband, Abner, that strange things seem to be happening at the Stephens' home. Gladys, June Foster, and Shirley Clyde, with their sons, visit the Stephens' home to welcome Samantha to the community. Gladys is frustrated in her attempts to point out to her friends the amazing number of objects which seem to appear and disappear. When the boys pester Endora, Samantha's mother, she uses magic to tie the three of them up. On leaving, Gladys tries to point out to her friends that it would be physically impossible for three boys to tie themselves up. Later Darrin returns home for his first meeting with Endora. Endora and Darrin soon engage in a heated argument about their opposing viewpoints on life. Endora threatens to turn Darrin into as artichoke. Later Samantha expresses her love for Darrin by announcing that if Endora had done so, she would also have turned herself into an artichoke.

programme.desc: Darrin finds out, the hard way, that his son Adam has supernatural powers.

To convince Darrin of her magic powers, Samantha performs a series of tricks. Darrin makes her promise never to practice her witchcraft again. Sheila, a former girl friend of Darrin's, invites the newly-weds to a dinner party. She makes every effort to embarrass Samantha before the guests. After enduring Sheila's snubs and insults, Samantha cannot resist evening the score. She employs her extraordinary powers to humiliate Sheila. Later, at home, Darrin rebukes his wife, but admits Sheila deserved the tricks played on her.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.sub-title: It Shouldn't Happen to a Dog
programme.desc: Samantha gives a dinner party to impress Rex Barker, one of Darrin's clients. Rex brings along his date, Babs Livingston, but advances on Samantha in the garden when he gets drunk.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: Gladys Kravitz, a neighbor, is unable to convince her husband, Abner, that strange things seem to be happening at the Stephens' home. Gladys, June Foster, and Shirley Clyde, with their sons, visit the Stephens' home to welcome Samantha to the community. Gladys is frustrated in her attempts to point out to her friends the amazing number of objects which seem to appear and disappear. When the boys pester Endora, Samantha's mother, she uses magic to tie the three of them up. On leaving, Gladys tries to point out to her friends that it would be physically impossible for three boys to tie themselves up. Later Darrin returns home for his first meeting with Endora. Endora and Darrin soon engage in a heated argument about their opposing viewpoints on life. Endora threatens to turn Darrin into as artichoke. Later Samantha expresses her love for Darrin by announcing that if Endora had done so, she would also have turned herself into an artichoke.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darrin finds out, the hard way, that his son Adam has supernatural powers.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Esmeralda's tragic magic strikes again!

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Samantha wakes up with a condition called Gravititis Inflamitis but puts it to good use for one of Darrin's clients.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Darin finds out that Serena is in trouble - with or without her power.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha is all set to learn to skate the mortal way, but Endora gives her a little help.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Serena slips Larry a youth pill and he becomes younger and younger and younger.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha’s first day at school turns out to an eventful one; she changes the class bully into a frog.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Esmeralda tries to zap George Washington's buckle and button out of a book, and instead zaps out George himself.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: A memorable visit from George and Martha Washington results from Esmeralda's messed up magic.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Tabitha gets an assist from her grandmother when Endora casts a spell that turns her into a 7year-old super genius.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: A Good Turn Never Goes Unpunished
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin argue over the use of witchcraft in an ad campaign.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.desc: Old Chines proverb: Witch should blink softly and never touch cinnamon stick.

programme.title: Bewitched
programme.sub-title: The Truth, Nothing But The Truth, So Help Me Sam
programme.desc: Endora casts a "truth spell" on a gift from Darrin to Samantha that causes everyone embarrassment.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.sub-title: I, Darrin, Take This Witch Samantha
programme.desc: Samantha and Darrin appear to be an ideally matched couple. Very much in love, they decide to marry. Darrin doesn't know that Samantha, is, of all things, a witch. On their wedding night, Samantha's mother, Endora, a witch, of course, visits her daughter. Regretting that her daughter has married a mortal, she is bent on breaking up the marriage. After pleading with her mother not to interfere, Samantha decides to tell her husband that he has unknowingly married a witch. To convince Darrin of her magic powers, Samantha performs a series of tricks. Darrin makes her promise never to practice her witchcraft again. Sheila, a former girl friend of Darrin's, invites the newly-weds to a dinner party. She makes every effort to embarrass Samantha before the guests. After enduring Sheila's snubs and insults, Samantha cannot resist evening the score. She employs her extraordinary powers to humiliate Sheila. Later, at home, Darrin rebukes his wife, but admits Sheila deserved the tricks played on her.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.sub-title: It Shouldn't Happen to a Dog
programme.desc: Samantha gives a dinner party to impress Rex Barker, one of Darrin's clients. Rex brings along his date, Babs Livingston, but advances on Samantha in the garden when he gets drunk.

programme.title: Bewitched (Colorized)
programme.desc: Gladys Kravitz, a neighbor, is unable to convince her husband, Abner, that strange things seem to be happening at the Stephens' home. Trying to tackle the loneliness of football widowhood, Mary snags tickets to the big game--but she fumbles her chance to score points with Lester when she insists on going along.
When Mary buys a piano, Rose peddles her teaching services to both her and Sandra--and the two pupils' rivalry inspires a competitive recital to determine who's learned more in three weeks.

When their church loses its lease, Mary coaxes an already overburdened Lester into supervising its move to a new location--but the parishioners are left without a place to worship on Christmas Day when the building mysteriously disappears
Mary and Sandra offer differing opinions when Rose is asked to spend the weekend in New York with the man of her dreams--who also happens to be one of Sandra's ex-nightmares.
When Calvin stays at the Jenkins' for the weekend, he misreads Sandra's attempts to cheer him up and falls madly in love with her, putting Mary in an awkward position.

When Lester's supposedly wealthy friend mysteriously accepts work as the building handyman, Mary sets out reveal his real motive and accidentally unveils more than one skeleton harbored in his "closet." Wrestling impresario Captain Lou Albano makes his television series debut as the gregarious handyman, Gus Santo.
Lester's dreams of cashing in his bonus from work for a new sports car come to a screeching halt when burglars break in and clean out the apartment--fueling Mary's desire to get new furniture.
Mary and Brenda cry foul when Sandra hooks up with a pro basketball player whose arrogant moves and behind-the-back "passes" rub off on impressionable Calvin.

Mary and Lester throw an extravagant bash for her parents' 50th wedding anniversary, only to find that the guests of honor aren't speaking to each other. Veteran performers Beah Richards and Whitman Mayo guest star as Mary's feuding parents.

Mary gambles her relationship with Rose and Pearl when she belittles their passion for the lottery, but the odds of losing their friendship increase when Sandra spies Mary playing a hunch and buying her own ticket.

Mary, Rose and Pearl may be sent "up the river" after they go overboard defending "227" against a graffiti artist who then sues them for assault--and it seems even bleaker when the key to their defense is the testimony of a lone eyewitness--Sandra.
Mary and Rose help Pearl face the loneliness of old age by escorting her to a single's bar where she meets the man of her dreams--and promptly gets engaged.
When Mary reluctantly agrees to partner with Sandra in the pillow-making business, she finds herself doing all the work--with Sandra reaping all the "benefits."

Lester turns into a real pain for Mary when he comes home from work early complaining of a stomach ache, but when she sneaks out for a pedicure, Lester is stricken with appendicitis--leaving Sandra to care for him.

Alarmed that her biological clock is winding down, Sandra sets out to find a perfect husband to father her child, but when she strikes out with the available men, she decides to have a baby anyway--regardless of her marital status.
Anxious to become an adult, Brenda (Regina King) takes on part-time work, but soon discovers learning how to juggle all her responsibilities is a full-time job.

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: The team behind the global phenomenon The Da Vinci Code returns for the highly anticipated Angels & Demons, based upon the bestselling novel by Dan Brown. Tom Hanks reprises his role as Harvard symbologist Robert Langdon, who once again finds that forces with ancient roots are willing to stop at nothing, even murder, to advance their goals

programme.title: Inferno (2016)
programme.desc: Robert Langdon follows clues to stop a virus that would wipe out half the world's population.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game of the same name, Alice and Rain are the leaders of a commando-team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-Dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: Resident Evil: Welcome To Raccoon City
programme.desc: Witness the beginning of Evil Raccoon City, which was once a booming home of pharmaceutical giant Umbrella Corporation, is now a dying Midwestern town. The company's exodus left the city a wasteland with great evil brewing below the surface. When that evil is unleashed, a group of survivors must work together to uncover the truth behind Umbrella and make it through the night.

programme.title: Resident Evil
programme.desc: Based on the popular video game of the same name, Alice and Rain are the leaders of a commando-team who must break into "the hive," a vast underground genetics laboratory operated by the powerful Umbrella Corporation. There, a deadly virus has been unleashed, killing the lab's personnel and resurrecting them as the evil Un-Dead. The team has just three hours to shut down the lab's supercomputer and close the facility before the virus threatens to overrun the Earth

programme.title: Resident Evil: Apocalypse
programme.desc: After escaping from the Racoon City Medical Facility Alice searches for answers to the T-Virus and how to contain it, all while trying to find a way to escape the ruined city with fellow survivors.

programme.title: Passengers (2016)
programme.desc: Jennifer Lawrence and Chris Pratt star in an adventure about two passengers traveling to a new planet when their spaceship malfunctions.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels (2000)
programme.desc: They're beautiful, they're brilliant and they work for Charlie.

programme.title: Charlie's Angels: Full Throttle
programme.desc: The Angels (Cameron Diaz, Drew Barrymore & Lucy Liu) go head-to-head with Angel-Gone-Bad!

programme.title: Resident Evil: Extinction
programme.desc: Milla Jovovich is back to kill more zombies in the third chapter of the hit Resident Evil franchise! An action/horror film filled with huge special effects and edge-of-your-seat terror! Survivors of the Raccoon City catastrophe travel across the Nevada desert, hoping to make it to Alaska. Alice (Jovovich) joins the caravan and their fight against the evil Umbrella Corp.

programme.title: Lakeview Terrace
programme.desc: A young interracial couple move into their dream home and are increasingly harassed by their next-door neighbor, a tightly wound black LAPD officer. When the couple decides to fight back the feud turns deadly.

programme.title: All The Money in The World
programme.desc: After the kidnapping of John Paul Getty III, in a race against time, his mother works to convince his wealthy grandfather to pay the ransom. Inspired by historical events. Certain scenes, characters and dialogue have been fictionalized for dramatic purposes.

programme.title: In the Line of Fire
programme.desc: Clint Eastwood delivers the goods as a veteran Secret Service agent whose shameful secret is known to the serial killer that eludes him.

programme.title: Tears of the Sun
programme.desc: After a West African president's family is assassinated and civil unrest is rampant, a top secret team is deployed to the far reaches of the jungle to rescue a U.S. doctor who is acting as a missionary. She insists the U.S. forces rescue all of her charges. As a result, the group falls under rebel attacks when it is revealed that the son of the deposed West African president is among those being saved.

programme.title: Black Hawk Down
programme.desc: Based on the true story of a war waged in Mogadishu by the high tech Black Hawk helicopters and the US Army Rangers and Deltas.

programme.title: The Patriot (2000)
programme.desc: In 1776 South Carolina, widower Benjamin Martin (Gibson) finds himself thrust into the midst of the American Revolutionary War as he helplessly watches his family being torn apart by the savage forces of the British Redcoats. When his oldest son's wife is ruthlessly killed, and his young son is shot through the back before his eyes, Martin is unable to suppress the soldier within that he tried to bury with his own military past. Unable to remain silent, he recruits a band of unlikely volunteers to take up arms against the British. Fighting to protect his famliy's freedom and his country's independence, Martin discovers the pain of betrayal, the redemption of revenge, and the passion of love.

programme.title: District 9
programme.desc: From producer Peter Jackson and director Neill Blomkamp comes a startlingly original science-fiction thriller where alien refugees, stranded on Earth, are exiled to a slum on the fringes of Johannesburg.

programme.title: Rambo (2008)
programme.desc: Twenty years have passed and John Rambo has retreated to northern Thailand. When a group of human rights missionaries fall into the hands of the Burmese army he sets aside his reluctance for violence and conflict and the Vietnam lethal super soldier re-emerges.

programme.title: Ultraviolet (2006)
programme.desc: Set in the late 21st century, a subculture of humans called Hemophages has emerged who have been genetically modified, giving them enhanced speed, incredible stamina and acute intelligence. To the government's dismay, more and more of the population are being transformed, and they have set out to rid the world of this new subculture that they deem a menace to society. One rogue warrior is bent on protecting her race - and seeking revenge on those who changed her life forever. With fierce fighting skills and chameleon-like abilities, Violet sets out to destroy a government-designed time bomb that will eliminate all Hemophages.

programme.title: Stealth
programme.desc: Deeply ensconced in a top-secret military program, three pilots struggle to bring an artificial intelligence program under control ... before it initiates the next world war.

programme.title: Hellboy
programme.desc: A demon, raised from infancy after being conjured by and rescued from the Nazis, grows up to become a defender against the forces of darkness.

programme.title: Gattaca
programme.desc: Ethan Hawke and Uma Thurman star in this futuristic sci-fi thriller about a world where genetic engineering is used to perfect the human species.

programme.title: Hancock
programme.desc: There are heroes--there are superheroes--and then there's Hancock. With great power comes great responsibility--everyone knows that--everyone, that is, but Hancock. Edgy, conflicted, sarcastic, and misunderstood, Hancock's well-intentioned heroics might get the job done and save countless lives, but always seem to leave jaw-dropping damage in their wake. The public has finally had enough--as grateful as they are to have their local hero, the good citizens of Los Angeles are wondering what they ever did to deserve this guy. Hancock isn't the kind of man who cares what other people think--until the day that he saves the life of PR executive Ray Embrey, and the sardonic superhero begins to realize that he may have a vulnerable side after all. Facing that will be Hancock's greatest challenge yet--and a task that may prove impossible as Ray's wife, Mary, insists that he's a lost cause.

programme.title: Second In Command
programme.desc: A former Navy SEAL tries to stop an army of well-armed insurgents from killing their country's president, who's taken refuge within the American embassy.

programme.title: Tears of the Sun
programme.desc: After a West African president's family is assassinated and civil unrest is rampant, a top secret team is deployed to the far reaches of the jungle to rescue a U.S. doctor who is acting as a missionary. She insists the U.S. forces rescue all of her charges. As a result, the group falls under rebel attacks when it is revealed that the son of the deposed West African president is among those being saved.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

programme.title: Euphoria

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: Rooster
programme.desc: Greg motivates the hockey team before a game, Katie focuses on her internship, and Archie gets feedback on his book.

programme.desc: The true story of mixed martial arts and UFC fighter Mark Kerr, whose obsession with greatness made him a legend -- and nearly cost him everything.

programme.title: Real Time With Bill Maher

programme.title: Crazy Rich Asians
programme.desc: Rachel Chu is happy to accompany her longtime boyfriend, Nick, to his best friend's wedding in Singapore. She's also surprised to learn that Nick's family is extremely wealthy, and he's considered one of the country's most eligible bachelors. Thrust into the spotlight, Rachel must now contend with jealous socialites, quirky relatives and something far, far worse -- Nick's disapproving mother.

Whether it's his marriage, being a dog parent, AI, or religion, Ramy comes at everything with his own brand of heart and humor.

programme.title: Black Adam
programme.desc: In ancient Kahndaq, Teth Adam was bestowed the almighty powers of the gods. After using these powers for vengeance, he was imprisoned, becoming Black Adam. Nearly 5,000 years have passed, and Black Adam has gone from man to myth to legend. Now free, his unique form of justice, born out of rage, is challenged by modern-day heroes who form the Justice Society: Hawkman, Dr. Fate, Atom Smasher and Cyclone.

programme.title: 38 at the Garden
programme.desc: Point guard Jeremy Lin, an undrafted Harvard graduate, shocks fans, stuns his teammates and galvanizes Asians around the world during his landmark 2011-12 season with the New York Knicks and sparks the "Linsanity" craze.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: Rue is offered a risky deal that draws her deeper into Alamo's world; Nate battles the city council, Maddy gives Cassie a mission that could skyrocket her new career; Lexi enlists Jules to create an original painting for LA Nights.

programme.title: Friendship
programme.desc: A suburban dad falls hard for his new neighbor.

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: The Perfect Match
programme.desc: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

programme.title: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: Prometheus
programme.desc: The discovery of a clue to mankind's origins on Earth leads a team of explorers to the darkest parts of the universe. Two brilliant young scientists lead the expedition. Shaw hopes that they will meet a race of benevolent, godlike beings who will in some way verify her religious beliefs, while Holloway is out to debunk any spiritual notions. However, neither the scientists nor their shipmates are prepared for the unimaginable terrors that await them.

programme.title: Alien: Covenant
programme.desc: Bound for a remote planet on the far side of the galaxy, members (Katherine Waterston, Billy Crudup) of the colony ship Covenant discover what they think to be an uncharted paradise. While there, they meet David (Michael Fassbender), the synthetic survivor of the doomed Prometheus expedition. The mysterious world soon turns dark and dangerous when a hostile alien life-form forces the crew into a deadly fight for survival.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: During the approach of the most powerful storm in decades, university professor Dr. Jo Harding (Helen Hunt) and an underfunded team of students prepares the prototype for Dorothy, a ground-breaking tornado data-gathering device conceived by her estranged husband, Bill (Bill Paxton). When Harding tells Bill that Dorothy is ready for testing -- and that their privately funded rival Dr. Jonas Miller (Cary Elwes) has stolen the idea and built his own -- Bill rejoins the team for one last mission.

programme.title: Spider-Man: Across the Spider-Verse
programme.desc: After reuniting with Gwen Stacy, Brooklyn's full-time, friendly neighborhood Spider-Man is catapulted across the Multiverse, where he encounters a team of Spider-People charged with protecting its very existence. However, when the heroes clash on how to handle a new threat, Miles finds himself pitted against the other Spiders. He must soon redefine what it means to be a hero so he can save the people he loves most.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

programme.title: Half Man

programme.title: Monster-in-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte (Jennifer Lopez) is smitten when she meets Dr. Kevin Fields (Michael Vartan). So when Kevin pops the question after they start dating, Charlotte happily accepts. But she soon realizes that Kevin's mom, Viola (Jane Fonda), is not quite thrilled to have a new family member. Viola, a newscaster, has just lost her job and is feeling rather attached to Kevin, so she regards Charlotte as her new competition -- and will apparently do anything to make her son call off the wedding.

programme.title: Babygirl
programme.desc: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

programme.desc: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

programme.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
programme.desc: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

programme.title: Boys Go to Jupiter
programme.desc: Billy 5000, a teenage gig worker with a rise-and-grind mindset, aims to make $5,000. His quest is derailed by a gelatinous alien's appearance.

programme.title: Call Me by Your Name

He soon meets Oliver, a handsome doctoral student who's working as an intern for Elio's father. Amid the sun-drenched splendor of their surroundings, Elio and Oliver discover the heady beauty of awakening desire over the course of a summer that will alter their lives forever.

programme.desc: As players and staff deal with the stress of living up to the club's ambitious goals, ACFC kicks off their inaugural NWSL season at home in front of a vibrant, star-studded crowd.

programme.title: The Curse of La Llorona
programme.desc: In the 1970s Los Angeles, the legendary ghost La Llorona is stalking the night -- and the children. Ignoring the eerie warning of a troubled mother, a social worker and her own kids are drawn into a frightening supernatural realm. Their only hope of surviving La Llorona's deadly wrath is a disillusioned priest who practices mysticism to keep evil at bay.

programme.title: Dust Bunny
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

programme.title: MacGruber
programme.desc: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

programme.title: Euphoria
programme.desc: A group of high school students navigates drugs, sex, identity, trauma, social media, love and friendship.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: Half Man
programme.desc: 1993. His mother asks Niall to lie in court about Ruben's violence, and he is conflicted. Ruben seems different now, so the decision weighs heavily on him.

programme.title: The Substance
programme.desc: Fading actress Elisabeth Sparkle becomes distressed when her chauvinistic boss fires her from her aerobics show. She soon injects herself with a mysterious serum that promises a younger, better version of herself, but things go horribly wrong.

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
programme.desc: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

programme.title: Atomic Blonde
programme.desc: Sensual and savage, Lorraine Broughton is the most elite spy in MI6, an agent who's willing to use all of her lethal skills to stay alive during an impossible mission. With the Berlin Wall about to fall, she travels into the heart of the city to retrieve a priceless dossier and take down a ruthless espionage ring. Once there, she teams up with an embedded station chief to navigate her way through the deadliest game of spies.

programme.title: Flight Risk
programme.desc: A U.S. marshal boards a small plane to transfer a government witness to New York. As they cross the Alaskan wilderness, tensions start to rise as not everyone on the flight is who they appear to be.

programme.title: Death of a Unicorn
programme.desc: A weekend retreat has deadly consequences when a father and daughter accidentally hit and kill a unicorn while en route to find his billionaire boss, who seeks to exploit the creature's miraculous curative properties.

programme.title: The Greatest Showman
programme.desc: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

programme.title: Ne Zha 2
programme.desc: Born to mortal parents, a rebellious young demigod uses his immense powers to battle an ancient force that's bent on humanity's destruction.

programme.title: Super/Man: The Christopher Reeve Story
programme.desc: Actor Christopher Reeve rises to stardom when he lands the role of Superman in the 1970s. When a horse-riding accident leaves him paralyzed in 1995, Reeve spends the rest of his life searching for a cure for spinal cord injuries.

programme.title: My Mom Jayne
programme.desc: Mariska Hargitay's journey to understand and embrace the public and private legacy of her mother, Hollywood icon Jayne Mansfield.

programme.title: Nine Lives
programme.desc: Tom Brand is a billionaire whose workaholic lifestyle takes him away from his loving wife Lara and adorable daughter Rebecca. Needing a present for Rebecca's 11th birthday, Brand buys a seemingly harmless cat from a mysterious pet store. Suddenly, a bizarre turn of events traps poor Tom inside the animal's body. The owner of the business tells him that he has one week to reconnect with his family, or live out the rest of his days as a cute and furry feline named Mr. Fuzzypants.

programme.title: Girls Trip
programme.desc: Best friends Ryan, Sasha, Lisa and Dina are in for the adventure of a lifetime when they travel to New Orleans for the annual Essence Festival. Along the way, they rekindle their sisterhood and rediscover their wild side by doing enough dancing, drinking, brawling and romancing to make the Big Easy blush.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
programme.desc: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

programme.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
programme.desc: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
programme.desc: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

programme.title: Ice Age: Continental Drift
programme.desc: Scrat's continuous pursuit of an infernal acorn has world-changing consequences for Manny (Ray Romano), Sid (John Leguizamo) and Diego (Denis Leary) when the continents split apart. The continental crack-up separates Manny and his friends from the rest of the herd, including Manny's mate, Ellie (Jennifer Lopez) and rebellious daughter Peaches (Keke Palmer). The pals are desperate to return home, but a pirate (Peter Dinklage) and his ragtag crew stand in their way.

programme.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
programme.desc: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

programme.title: Charlie and the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Based on the beloved Roald Dahl tale, this comedic and fantastical film follows young Charlie Bucket (Freddie Highmore) and his Grandpa Joe (David Kelly) as they join a small group of contest winners who get to tour the magical and mysterious factory of eccentric candy maker Willy Wonka (Johnny Depp). Aided by his diminutive Oompa Loompa workers (Deep Roy), Wonka has a hidden motivation for the tour, one that he will reveal only after the children in the group show their true colors.

programme.title: The Devil Wears Prada
programme.desc: Andy is a recent college graduate with big dreams. Upon landing a job at prestigious Runway magazine, she finds herself the assistant to diabolical editor Miranda Priestly. Andy questions her ability to survive her grim tour as Miranda's whipping girl without getting scorched.

programme.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
programme.desc: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

programme.title: The Fate of the Furious
programme.desc: With Dom and Letty married, Brian and Mia retired and the rest of the crew exonerated, the globe-trotting team has found some semblance of a normal life. They soon face an unexpected challenge when a woman named Cipher forces Dom to betray them all. They must unite to bring home the man who made them a family and stop Cipher from unleashing chaos.

programme.title: Greenland
programme.desc: John Garrity, his estranged wife and their young son embark on a perilous journey to find sanctuary as a planet-killing comet hurtles toward Earth. Amid terrifying accounts of cities getting leveled, the family experiences the best and worst in humanity. As the countdown to the global apocalypse approaches zero, their incredible trek culminates in a desperate, last-minute flight to a possible safe haven.

programme.title: Greenland 2: Migration
programme.desc: In the aftermath of a comet strike that decimated most of the planet, the Garrity family must leave the safety of their Greenland bunker to traverse a shattered world in search of a new home.

programme.title: One South: Portrait of a Psych Unit
programme.desc: Young adults in crisis arrive at One South and the doctors rush to evaluate, stabilize, and support them, with the goal of readying them to leave the unit with a practical out patient treatment plan; the patients have several group therapy sessions.

programme.title: One Survivor Remembers
programme.desc: Family photos, film clips and interviews tell Gerda Weissmann's story of the Holocaust, in tribute to the millions who died during World War II.

programme.title: Christy
programme.desc: Christy Martin never imagined life beyond her small-town roots in West Virginia, until she discovered a knack for punching people. Fueled by grit, raw determination, and an unshakable desire to win, she charges into the world of boxing under the guidance of her trainer and manager-turned-husband, Jim. Flaunting a fiery persona in the ring, her toughest battles start to unfold outside it as she confronts family, identity, and a relationship that just might become life-or-death.

programme.title: Battle of the Sexes
programme.desc: The 1973 tennis match between Billie Jean King and Bobby Riggs became the most watched televised sports event of all time. Trapped in the media glare, King and Riggs were on opposites sides of a binary argument, but off-court each was fighting more personal and complex battles. With her husband urging her to fight for equal pay, the private King was also struggling to come to terms with her own sexuality, while Riggs gambled his legacy and reputation in a bid to relive the glories of his past.

programme.title: Meg 2: The Trench
programme.desc: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

programme.title: The Lighthouse
programme.desc: Two lighthouse keepers try to maintain their sanity while living on a remote and mysterious New England island in the 1890s.

programme.title: One Battle After Another
programme.desc: Bob is a washed-up revolutionary who lives in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited and self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces and Willa goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her as both father and daughter battle the consequences of their pasts.

programme.title: Materialists
programme.desc: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

programme.title: Spring Breakers
programme.desc: College students Candy (Vanessa Hudgens), Faith (Selena Gomez), Brit (Ashley Benson) and Cotty (Rachel Korine) are short of the cash they need for a spring-break trip, so they rob a diner and head down to Florida. However, the police soon break up the party and arrest them. The curvaceous quartet are unexpectedly bailed out by a drug dealer and aspiring rap artist named Alien (James Franco). Soon after, three of the four gal pals decide to join Alien in a life of crime.

programme.title: Logan
programme.desc: In the near future, a weary Logan (Hugh Jackman) cares for an ailing Professor X (Patrick Stewart) at a remote outpost on the Mexican border. His plan to hide from the outside world gets upended when he meets a young mutant (Dafne Keen) who is very much like him. Logan must now protect the girl and battle the dark forces that want to capture her.

programme.title: X-Men: First Class
programme.desc: In the early 1960s, during the height of the Cold War, a mutant named Charles Xavier (James McAvoy) meets a fellow mutant named Erik Lehnsherr (Michael Fassbender). Despite their vastly different backgrounds -- Charles grew up with a wealthy family, while Erik lost his parents at Auschwitz -- the two become close friends. As the world teeters on the brink of a nuclear war, Charles and Erik with other mutants join forces to save humanity. However, a situation soon tears the friends apart.

programme.title: The Batman
programme.desc: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean Potter finds joy and escape through his early success at extreme climbing, where he connects with a community of like-minded people seeking the sport's freedom and adrenaline; Dean's restless energy compels him to pioneer new ascents and forge new world records, even while at times falling afoul of the establishment and struggling with personal relationships.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: Dean struggles with his inner demons but seems to find relief through death-defying feats from free-soloing, to highlining, to BASE jumping, cultivating a devoted following drawn to his rebellious antihero image; but soon, a new climber named Alex Honnold emerges and threatens to eclipse Dean's dominance.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: The rivalry between Dean and Alex Honnold intensifies as both climbers vie to be the first to free solo a route on the 3000-foot El Capitan; as Dean's mental state deteriorates, he alienates his inner circle and accepts a dangerous career opportunity in China.

programme.title: The Dark Wizard
programme.desc: With a new relationship grounding him, Dean regains emotional stability and his long-held dream of flight comes to fruition when he immerses himself in the cutting-edge world of wingsuit flying.

programme.title: Mom and Dad Save the World
programme.desc: While planning to destroy Earth with a gigantic laser beam, Emperor Tod Spengo (Jon Lovitz), ruler of the planet Spengo, catches a glimpse of housewife Marge Nelson (Teri Garr) and becomes smitten with her. Beaming Marge and her husband, Dick (Jeffrey Jones), up to Spengo from California, the daft, dimwitted leader tries to woo her, and sends her spouse to prison. Soon Dick is plotting an insurgency, in hopes of overthrowing Spengo and rescuing his wife.

programme.title: Joker
programme.desc: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

programme.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
programme.desc: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

programme.title: Insidious
programme.desc: A family looks to prevent evil spirits from trapping their comatose child in a realm called The Further.

programme.title: Killers
programme.desc: Spencer is an assassin in love. But a picture-perfect marriage will not save the couple from becoming targets.

programme.title: Die in a Gunfight
programme.desc: Two star-crossed lovers fight to stay together against schemers, killers, and their own families.

programme.title: Guns Akimbo
programme.desc: A guy relies on his newly acquired gladiator skills to save his ex-girlfriend from kidnappers.

programme.title: The Happytime Murders
programme.desc: When the puppet cast of a TV show begin to get murdered, a disgraced LAPD detective takes on the case.

programme.desc: A party girl and her sexy friends dress up as nuns to hide out from an angry L.A. drug lord.

programme.desc: A couple is accused of sodomy and pedophilia. Soon their sons are taken away, and they are thrown in jail.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: The first episode of a comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. Recently-orphaned Southerner Christopher goes to live with his nan on a council estate in Liverpool - there he forms an unlikely unholy alliance with working-class Reece. On the verge of being expelled, Reece convinces his school's headmaster to give him one last chance and allow him to mentor Christopher to prove that he can positively contribute to the school - despite their differences, a friendship develops between the pair until Christopher throws Reece under the bus in order to impress a girl. An angry Reece can't resist getting his revenge on Christopher, but will this ruin his chances of remaining at the school? Meanwhile, Aimee reluctantly gives her boyfriend Lewis a gift to help with his sexual needs, but she soon learns that he has been cheating on her and seeks revenge...

programme.desc: Action-adventure based on an iconic fictional character who first appeared in a 1996 video game. Lara Croft is the fiercely independent daughter of eccentric adventurer Lord Richard Croft, who vanished when she was scarcely a teen - now a young woman of 21 with no real focus or purpose, Lara navigates the chaotic streets of trendy East London as a bike courier... that is, until she goes explicitly against her dad's final wishes and leaves everything behind to find his last-known location.

programme.title: The Only Way is Essex
programme.desc: Drama continues in Vietnam as Liv has doubts about her friendship with Elma. Can they see each other's point of view and move on? Meanwhile, romance is in the air as the group find out that Dani and Jonnie have kissed. Dani updates Ella and Jodie about her being in her cougar era; she's playing it cool but doesn't deny it could happen again. Back in Essex, Sophie and Jordan are taking the next steps towards parenthood, unpacking their baby shopping as their new arrival becomes more real by the day. After the fallout of Freddie's departure from Vietnam, Saff is more confused than ever. She wants to get to the bottom of it, so when Freddie comes round to see her it's the perfect opportunity to clear things up. Will they be able to repair their friendship?

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Brian reluctantly signs up for The Price is Right at Stewie's insistence, he ends up winning a boat and quickly lets this go to his head - after prompting Stewie to call him out of his hypocrisy regarding game shows, Brian names his boat Row v Wade to prove that he has a social conscience and picks up women from Texas seeking legal abortions. Meanwhile, Banksy paints on Peter's face after a drinking binge.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Subversive animated comedy. After Peter drinks heavily at a bachelor party - even though he told Lois he would not - he is fired from his job at the Happy-Go-Lucky toy factory for being hung over. He applies for welfare, but a mix-up results in him being sent a cheque for 150,000 dollars.

programme.title: Family Guy
programme.desc: Anarchic animated sitcom about a dysfunctional family in a wacky Rhode Island town. When Peter is at the Drunken Clam lamenting the fact that he's stuck working at the Pawtucket Brewery and never obtained his dream job, Joe gets the idea for everyone to share their own dream occupations - Peter imagines himself as Agent 555 Lap Band, Quagmire sees himself as an overweight bachelor in the 1980s who invents aerobics, and Cleveland envisions himself working in the Los Angeles Police Department.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Animated series about Stan Smith, who works for the CIA and is constantly on the alert for terrorist activity. Stan is mad because after getting his wife a job as an estate agent, she makes more money than him. His daughter Hayley runs a programme to help the homeless, and son Steve wants to make a TV show involving tramps fighting each other.

programme.title: American Dad!
programme.desc: Stan goes head-to-head with Roger when he starts stealing birds' eggs. Plus, Francine tries new Italian cooking sauce.

programme.title: G'wed
programme.desc: Comedy series providing an honest, uplifting and heart-warming portrayal of the lives of working-class teenagers from Liverpool while tackling issues with a refreshing humour. It's Diversity and Inclusion Week and The Brimble, the most 'woke' girl at the school, has convinced the headmaster that the pupils should be set the task of pairing up with their polar opposite and present their differences and common ground in a presentation. Mo, who has fancied The Brimble for ages, spots his opportunity to try and impress her by suggesting they team up as he is a devout practising Muslim (he's not). Fascinated by his alleged faith, The Brimble leaps at the chance and asks if she can come to his house to observe a real Muslim family - keen to keep up the pretence, Mo calls his non-practicing Muslim parents and begs them to help him out. They agree... but when Mo and The Brimble arrive at the house, it becomes apparent that they are going to teach their son a life lesson about truth and faith.

programme.title: Plebs
programme.desc: Sitcom set in ancient Rome. It's time for the Lupercalia - the Roman festival of love - when Marcus is asked out by Gloria from next door, but he can't tell if it's a date or a meeting about their party wall. Meanwhile, Jason tries to maintain his Lupercalia perfect score as Grumio enjoys a romantic meal for one...

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: Join Stephen Mulhern as Mike gets his opportunity to take on the Banker and must choose whether to take an offer from the Banker in exchange for what's in his box or hold out until the end for a chance at a reward.

With English vineyards growing in reputation in the global wine market, Laura and Rosemary are excited to be invited to the Crickle Valley vineyard - however, weeds are choking this year's crop and the gardeners are stumped for a horticultural solution to this massive problem. Events turn sinister when a visiting wine columnist staying at the winery's hotel dies in mysterious circumstances - meanwhile, brothers Ben and Stuart, who run the vineyard and hotel respectively, are at odds over the future of the property in a rivalry made worse by the murder of Daisy, who was Ben's girlfriend and Stuart's employee. Can cunning detective work by Rosemary and Laura unmask the killer and ensure that this year's vintage of Crickle Valley wines will finally make it to the bottles?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. When a blizzard sets in and Miss Marple is forced to take refuge at Sittaford House - which is isolated on a bleak Devon moor - the owner of the house inexplicably decides to spend the night at a local hotel where a Ouija board predicts his death. He is later found dead in his room - and Miss Marple's suspicions are confirmed...

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby and Jones investigate when the appearance of a headless horseman at Quitewell Hall foreshadows a number of deaths among an aristocratic family called the DeQuettevilles - as the family stage a Civil War re-enactment with their hostile neighbours and relive historic battles, can the detectives uncover the truth about the DeQuettevilles and the ghostly rider in order to prevent more murders?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Grady Felton returns home to Midsomer after serving time for the murder of local youngster Daniel Denning, and Daniel's extended family are angry at his reappearance. Around the time that Grady arrives, his defence barrister Giles Harrison is killed. Grady had threatened Harrison and others - including Jones - but his alibi is strong. Later, Grady's house is firebombed, leaving him in a coma. Daniel's former friend Fred Burns is on trial for drugs offences. When Barnaby looks into Fred's background, he finds that a large sum of money appeared in Fred's bank account after the attack on Grady. After the court appearance, Jones learns that another lawyer on Grady's hit-list has been killed - but since Grady is in intensive care, he could not have been the culprit. As the detectives look further into the case, they discover that Grady always claimed innocence. Could a 'friend' be acting out Grady's revenge plan?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: As darkness covers Midsomer Stanton during a total eclipse of the sun, amateur astronomer Jeremy Harper is killed by a blow to the head with a meteorite. Barnaby and Jones soon discover intrigue, sexual tension and academic rivalry are rife among the star-seeking community.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The murder of a journalist has chilling echoes of a 1960s horror film starring Midsomer's own Stella Harris. When Stella's more famous sister returns after a 40-year family rift, the killings escalate, each of them reminiscent of a movie plot. Is life - and death - imitating art?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders

A pleasant afternoon at a cricket match turns ugly when former county-cricketer - and ex-spy - Geoffrey Larkin is found gashed to death. Locals blame the 'beast of Midsomer', but Barnaby is unconvinced, especially when he discovers that umpire and retired spymaster Malcolm Frazer is using his home, Allenby House, as a safe house. Soon Barnaby discovers links to a spy ring that operated in Berlin during the Cold War, but his investigation is obstructed at every turn, and it seems as though shady dealings are still going on at Allenby House. Then there is another murder - can Barnaby solve the crime before any people get hurt? And will his police career survive a run-in with MI6? Guest starring Peter Davison, Alice Krige and Anna Massey.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When a survivalist is found murdered in his bombproof shelter, Barnaby unravels a dark conspiracy that reveals just how far people will go to escape the end of the world.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. What starts out as a missing persons case soon escalates into a kidnap and ransom, but when the perpetrators cleverly stay one step ahead of the police, it soon becomes clear that they are not average criminals. The victim is Xun Li, who fled to the UK from persecution in China, the country of his birth - Xun quickly built up a successful property business but made a few enemies in the process. Instinctive police work and collaboration with his distraught wife ensures that Xun is rescued and returned safely - it appears that the case is closed, but an unexpected turn of events throws it wide open again.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. Having returned a kidnap victim safe and sound, the team are thrown on to the back foot when he is found murdered - the way the victim died suggests that a local protection gang is to blame, but nailing the woman they believe is behind it proves challenging as the closed-knit Chinese community is unwilling to help the police. Diligent detective work throws up another suspect whom they can place at the scene, but an unexpected twist sees Banks discover a long-buried secret that unveils the real perpetrator.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: A lack of experienced officers means that Chief Superintendent Innocent has asked Lewis to come out of retirement to help newly-promoted DI Hathaway with his first murder investigation, a tricky case that bridges the worlds of neurosurgery, blood sports and animal rights - after an arson attack on a hunting lodge, Hathaway and new partner DS Lizzie Maddox have a dead neurosurgeon on their hands. Alastair Stoke was shot in the head on the farmland he co-owned with his troubled business partner, but the case begins to career out of control as Hathaway delves into the network of fear and loathing that surrounds the surgeon.

programme.title: Unwind with ITV

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of Professor Miranda Thornton after she apparently killed herself when her dating video was leaked onto a vicious media blog - Lewis does not believe that Thornton's death was suicide and has qualms about Kit Renton, the blog's founder, and Sophie Leland, the owner of the dating website. When one of Renton's employees is found murdered, the police realise she must have been killed because she knew something about Thornton's death - as Lewis finds that Thornton, Renton and Leland were all at Oxford together 20 years before, he realises that this is actually an age-old revenge story...

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus driver and his conductor pal. The company mounts an advertising campaign to attract more passengers.

programme.title: On the Buses

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When octogenarian Felicity Law puts a recently discovered piece by local landscape artist Henry Hogson up for auction, the painting causes a fierce bidding war. But soon after the sale, Felicity is found tortured and killed. She had announced that she would give the proceeds of the sale to the Arnold Simms School of Art, a school that helps criminals and which had recently lost its funding. Barnaby enlists Simms' art teacher daughter Matilda to help him navigate the local art world. He soon finds many tangled relationships between teachers, dealers and buyers. Things get more complicated when a Hogson masterpiece is stolen and Matilda's former lover Graham Spate offers another Hogson to greedy art dealer Anthony Prideaux. Then the death count begins to rise. The key to the case seems to be Matilda's 'little black book' - but can Barnaby and Jones find the book and catch the killer before anyone else gets hurt?

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Belle plays Nicola at her own game when she relays Rodney's latest story, which appears to suggest he is aware of his daughter's scheme. Doug asks Brenda out on a date.

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series set in 1960s Yorkshire. When a routine domestic disturbance takes a sinister turn, the CID are summoned. A wrestling show visits Aidensfield and Greengrass plays host to the Masked Marvel, much to his dog's distress.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series set in 1960s Yorkshire. A woman seeks Nick's help after he rescues her from a house fire. Greengrass decides to enter the tourist trade by offering bed-and-breakfast.

programme.title: Vera
programme.desc: Crime drama series based on characters created by Ann Cleeves. DCI Vera Stanhope is called to a quiet country lane where a young man has been found dead following a collision with a car - on closer inspection, it becomes clear that this is not an accident and is way more than a hit-and-run. Vera discovers that our victim is a popular market trader and heads down to his pitch to start to put together an idea of who our man is and ascertain why anyone would want him dead - as the investigation gathers pace, Vera learns that our cheeky chappy was a complex character who was antagonistic, arrogant and able to get what he wants, but it also appears that all of this came at a price. As she unravels secrets, lies, betrayal, fractious relationships and intense rivalries, Vera must work out who would want the barrow boy buried - meanwhile, a familiar face from the past turns up with an uncertain agenda.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama. Banks breaks all the rules as he struggles to put personal feelings aside in the name of justice as the team begin the painful job of finding out exactly who was responsible for the incident that affected all their lives, and a concerned Chief Superintendent Anderson is forced to question if Banks is up to the job.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Crime drama series. As Helen is forced to choose between career ambition and loyalty to her team, Banks must grapple with dark emotions if he is to discover the truth behind the attack on Annie - after being put on gardening leave, Banks operates for the first time on the other side of the law and uses his years of experience, wits and wisdom to try and secure a breakthrough.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis again comes out of retirement to help newly-promoted DI Hathaway and his assistant DS Lizzie Maddox as the team's abilities are sorely tested by the brutal murder of American classics student Rose Anderson, whose body is hauled from a canal with stab wounds to the neck and abdomen - initial suspicion falls on the wife of astrophysics professor Felix Garwood, who had recently broken off an affair with Rose and is married to Rose's PhD supervisor. Could the jealous wife have committed murder?

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: As rising temperatures soften the ice road, the truckers risk a cold and watery grave. Their only hope is to form a convoy, but it is never easy on terrible terrain.

programme.title: The Grand Fishing Adventure
programme.desc: Ali Hamidi is joined by Bobby Zamora and diver Luc Boerrigter as they return to The Lake of Dreams, aka Grenville. Having failed to land one of the lake's giants in front of the underwater cameras on their previous trip here together, this time they target a huge carp of over 60lbs. Being spring, the carp are constantly on the move around the lake, with the team in hot pursuit. Will the carp run rings around the team, or will the mobile tactics pay off to bank that big one?

programme.title: Coogan's Bluff
programme.desc: Action comedy. Arizona Deputy Sheriff Coogan is sent to New York City to collect James Ringerman, a prisoner who has escaped from custody in Arizona - while Coogan is annoyed when everyone in New York City assumes that he is from Texas, his problems are made worse by news that the prisoner is in Bellevue after taking a trip on drugs while in custody. When Coogan decides to cut a few corners and the prisoner escapes in the process, Coogan is ordered home but refuses to do so without his man...
